title: Arvind Kejriwal requests Delhi High Court Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma to recuse from Excise policy case
description: Former Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal has filed an application in the Delhi High Court requesting Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma to recuse from hearing the appeal filed by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) discharging him and others in the Excise policy case. The application is likely to come up for consideration before Justice Sharma tomorrow. According to lawyers familiar with the case, Kejriwal is also likely to appear before the Court tomorrow and argue in person. Notably, Kejriw
